hero.question: Will CDU win the most seats in the 2026 Baden-Württemberg parliamentary elections?
hero.prob_take: CDU just lost 27 points in a day, signaling real money flowing to competitors after recent polling shifts show the Greens gaining momentum and SPD stabilizing, not weakness in CDU's baseline support. At 58%, you're getting paid 1.7-to-1 for a party that still leads every major poll and holds the state governorship, making this a classic panic-sell opportunity for patient capital.

daily_take.headline: Germany's Greens just flipped the script on Baden-Württemberg. CDU panic selling is your entry.
daily_take.deck: The CDU collapsed 27 points overnight in the 2026 Baden-Württemberg race while Greens surged 26 points to 41.2%. The move reeks of overreaction to a single poll or backroom noise. CDU is still the structural favorite in this state, but the panic has created a fat mispriced gap. Smart money fades the volatility and buys CDU at 58.4%.

sidebar.headline: Greens at 41.2% look attractive on momentum, but don't chase momentum in state elections. Wait for 58% CDU to find support.
sidebar.label: Greens: 41.2%

sidebar.headline: Jets favored at 72.3% against a Canucks team that's sliding. The -13.4 point drop on Canucks is justified, not a buy.
sidebar.label: Canucks: 27.7%

sidebar.headline: S&P at 7199.99 by year end sits at 57.5%. Barely above a coin flip. If you believe in the mega cap runaway, there's value here.
sidebar.label: S&P 7200: 57.5%
